titles.title: Communities of Recovery Reauthorization Act of 2025
Communities of Recovery Reauthorization Act of 2025
To amend the Public Health Service Act to reauthorize grants for building communities of recovery.

action.text: Referred to the House Committee on Energy and Commerce.

bill.summary:
Communities of Recovery Reauthorization Act of 2025
This bill reauthorizes through FY2030 the Building Communities of Recovery program, which is administered by the Center for Substance Abuse Treatment within the Substance Abuse and Mental Health Services Administration. This program provides grants to certain community nonprofit organizations for developing and delivering coordinated community and statewide recovery support services for individuals with substance use disorders.
